title: Help find missing teenager Anja Mintoor
bodyText:
Update @ 14:00 on 13 August: Missing Anja Mintoor has been found and is safe.

GEORGE NEWS -  Authorities are urgently seeking assistance in locating 16-year-old Anya Mintoor, who was reported missing after being last seen boarding a Go George bus in the u-Safe Parkdene area.


> She was last seen wearing a long peach-coloured jacket, a mustard-coloured cap and school trousers.


She was last seen boarding the bus between 17:00 and 18:00 last night, Monday 12 August, destined for Pacaltsdorp.

If anyone has information regarding Anya’s whereabouts or has seen her since she boarded the bus, please contact Rupert Pretorius at George Community Police Forum or the George police station.

- George Police Station: 044 803 4744
- Rupert Pretorius: 082 822 1870

Your assistance is crucial in helping us locate Anya and ensure her safe return.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
